title: Entity Sneeze Behavior
description: Allows the mob to sneeze, causing it to drop items and affect nearby mobs.

sound.title: Sound
sound.description: Sound to play when the sneeze occurs.

cooldown_time.title: Cooldown Time
cooldown_time.description: Time in seconds the mob has to wait before using the goal again

drop_item_chance.title: Drop Item Chance
drop_item_chance.description: The probability that the mob will drop an item when it sneezes.

cooldown.title: Cooldown
cooldown.description: The amount of time in seconds that the mob has to wait before selecting a target of the same type again

filters.title: Filters
filters.description: Conditions that make this entry in the list valid

max_dist.title: Max Dist
max_dist.description: Maximum distance this mob can be away to be a valid choice

must_see.title: Must See
must_see.description: If true, the mob has to be visible to be a valid choice

must_see_forget_duration.title: Must See Forget Duration
must_see_forget_duration.description: Determines the amount of time in seconds that this mob will look for a target before forgetting about it and looking for a new one when the target isn't visible any more

reevaluate_description.title: Reevaluate Description
reevaluate_description.description: If true, the mob will stop being targeted if it stops meeting any conditions.

sprint_speed_multiplier.title: Sprint Speed Multiplier
sprint_speed_multiplier.description: Multiplier for the running speed. A value of 1.0 means the speed is unchanged

walk_speed_multiplier.title: Walk Speed Multiplier
walk_speed_multiplier.description: Multiplier for the walking speed. A value of 1.0 means the speed is unchanged

anyOf.description:
Properties:
• check_if_outnumbered (boolean) = false
• cooldown (int) = 0
• filters ({ domain, operator, subject, ... }) = {"AND":null,"NOT":nu
• max_dist (float) = 16
• max_flee (float) = 10
• max_height (float) = -1
• must_see (boolean)
• must_see_forget_duration (int) = 3
• ... and 4 more properties

check_if_outnumbered.title: Check If Outnumbered
check_if_outnumbered.description: If true, the mob will check if its outnumbered

cooldown.title: Cooldown
cooldown.description: The amount of time in seconds that the mob has to wait before selecting a target of the same type again

domain.title: Domain
domain.description: The domain the test should be performed in.

subject.title: Subject
subject.description: The subject of this filter test.

test.title: Test
test.description: The name of the test to apply.

value.title: Value
value.description: The value being compared with the test.

filters.description: Conditions that make this entry in the list valid

max_dist.title: Max Dist
max_dist.description: Maximum distance this mob can be away to be a valid choice

max_flee.title: Max Flee
max_flee.description: Maximum distance this mob can be from the target to stop fleeing

max_height.title: Max Height
max_height.description: Maximum height this mob can be away to be a valid choice

must_see.title: Must See
must_see.description: If true, the mob has to be visible to be a valid choice

must_see_forget_duration.title: Must See Forget Duration
must_see_forget_duration.description: Determines the amount of time in seconds that this mob will look for a target before forgetting about it and looking for a new one when the target isn't visible any more

reevaluate_description.title: Reevaluate Description
reevaluate_description.description: If true, the mob will stop being targeted if it stops meeting any conditions.

sprint_speed_multiplier.title: Sprint Speed Multiplier
sprint_speed_multiplier.description: Multiplier for the sprinting speed. A value of 1.0 means the speed is unchanged

walk_speed_multiplier.title: Walk Speed Multiplier
walk_speed_multiplier.description: Multiplier for the walking speed. A value of 1.0 means the speed is unchanged

defaultSnippets.label: Entity Types (object)
defaultSnippets.description: Use Entity Types as an object

entity_types.title: Entity Types
entity_types.description: List of entity types this mob will startle (cause to jump) when it sneezes.

defaultSnippets.label: Entity Types (object)
defaultSnippets.description: Use Entity Types as an object

loot_table.title: Loot Table
loot_table.description: Loot table to select dropped items from.

prepare_sound.title: Prepare Sound
prepare_sound.description: Sound to play when the sneeze is about to happen.

prepare_time.title: Prepare Time
prepare_time.description: The time in seconds that the mob takes to prepare to sneeze (while the prepare_sound is playing).

priority.title: Priority
priority.description: As priority approaches 0, the priority is increased. The higher the priority, the sooner this behavior will be executed as a goal.

probability.title: Probability
probability.description: The probability of sneezing. A value of 1.00 is 100%

within_radius.title: Within Radius
within_radius.description: Distance in blocks that mobs will be startled.
